name: competition-checker
description: Analyze startup competition terms & conditions. Evidence-first, neutral scorecard across 7 founder-calibrated dimensions. Flags what T&Cs say AND what they don't say. Investment-term deep dive (SAFE/convertible notes). Negotiation context with landscape comparison. Cross-competition side-by-side comparison. Founder-personalized fit and ROI analysis. Input-agnostic (URL, PDF, screenshot, text).
